get.summary: Parameters queries the parameters of the module.
ListOperatorAuthorizations returns operator authorizations matching optional filters.

parameters.name: corporation_id
parameters.description: corporation_id filters by the corporation that granted the authorization.

parameters.name: operator
parameters.description: operator filters by the operator account that received the authorization.

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: response_max_size limits the number of results. Must be 1-1024, defaults to 64.

get.summary: [MOD-DE-QRY-3] GetOperatorAuthorization returns a single OperatorAuthorization by id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id is the OperatorAuthorization id to fetch.

get.summary: ListVSOperatorAuthorizations returns VS operator authorizations matching optional filters.

parameters.name: corporation_id
parameters.description: corporation_id filters by the corporation that granted the authorization.

parameters.name: vs_operator
parameters.description: vs_operator filters by the VS operator account.

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: response_max_size limits the number of results. Must be 1-1024, defaults to 64.

get.summary: [MOD-DE-QRY-4] GetVSOperatorAuthorization returns a single VSOperatorAuthorization by id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id is the VSOperatorAuthorization id to fetch.

cosmos.base.v1beta1.Coin.description:
Coin defines a token with a denomination and an amount.

NOTE: The amount field is an Int which implements the custom method
signatures required by gogoproto.

id.description: id is the own uint64 key of this OperatorAuthorization.

corporation_id.description:
corporation_id is the id of the corporation granting the authorization. The
(corporation_id, operator) tuple MUST be unique.

operator.description: operator is the account receiving the authorization.

msg_types.description: msg_types is the list of module message types this authorization applies to.

spend_limit.description: spend_limit is the maximum amount of funds the grantee is allowed to spend.

remaining_spend.description:
remaining_spend is the runtime balance for spend_limit. Present iff
spend_limit is set.

expiration.description:
expiration is the timestamp after which the authorization is no longer
valid.

period.description: period is the reset period for spend_limit. If set, expiration MUST also be set.

verana.de.v1.OperatorAuthorization.description:
OperatorAuthorization is the operator-delegation record. Per spec v4-rc2 it is
keyed by its own uint64 id; (corporation_id, operator) is a unique secondary
index.

verana.de.v1.Params.description: Params defines the parameters for the module.

participant_id.description:
participant_id is the id of the Participant this record applies to. Globally
unique across all ParticipantAuthorizationRecord entries.

msg_types.description:
msg_types is the list of delegable message types the vs_operator is
authorized for on behalf of corporation. Mandatory, frozen at create.

spend_limit.description: spend_limit is the maximum amount the vs_operator is allowed to spend.

remaining_spend.description:
remaining_spend is the runtime balance for spend_limit. Present iff
spend_limit is set.

fee_spend_limit.description:
fee_spend_limit is the maximum total amount of transaction fees that can be
spent by vs_operator.

remaining_fee_spend.description:
remaining_fee_spend is the runtime balance for fee_spend_limit. Present iff
fee_spend_limit is set.

with_feegrant.description:
with_feegrant indicates the corporation pays the transaction fees for
vs_operator.

expiration.description:
expiration is the authorization window boundary. A record created before
validation is disabled with expiration = now().

period.description: period is the reset period for spend_limit and fee_spend_limit.

verana.de.v1.ParticipantAuthorizationRec.description:
ParticipantAuthorizationRecord is a per-participant VS-operator authorization
nested inside a VSOperatorAuthorization. Keyed by participant_id, which is
globally unique across all records of all VSOperatorAuthorizations.

verana.de.v1.QueryGetOperatorAuthorizati.description:
QueryGetOperatorAuthorizationResponse is the response type for the
Query/GetOperatorAuthorization RPC method.

verana.de.v1.QueryGetVSOperatorAuthoriza.description:
QueryGetVSOperatorAuthorizationResponse is the response type for the
Query/GetVSOperatorAuthorization RPC method.

verana.de.v1.QueryListOperatorAuthorizat.description:
QueryListOperatorAuthorizationsResponse is the response type for the
Query/ListOperatorAuthorizations RPC method.

verana.de.v1.QueryListVSOperatorAuthoriz.description:
QueryListVSOperatorAuthorizationsResponse is the response type for the
Query/ListVSOperatorAuthorizations RPC method.

params.description: params holds all the parameters of this module.

verana.de.v1.QueryParamsResponse.description: QueryParamsResponse is response type for the Query/Params RPC method.

id.description: id is the own uint64 key of this VSOperatorAuthorization.

corporation_id.description:
corporation_id is the id of the corporation granting the authorization. The
(corporation_id, vs_operator) tuple MUST be unique.

vs_operator.description: vs_operator is the operator account receiving the authorization.

records.description:
records is the list of per-participant authorization records granted to
vs_operator by corporation_id.

verana.de.v1.VSOperatorAuthorization.description:
VSOperatorAuthorization is the VS-operator delegation, keyed by its own uint64
id; (corporation_id, vs_operator) is a unique secondary index. The entry
exists iff it has at least one record.
